author: lOrm
content: Partial fix: Point 3 (delete dead 'suppress unused warning' block) applied — removed lines 296-306 in src/session/task.rs. The orphaned 'if let Some(s) = status' code did nothing functionally. Compiles + tests pass. Mandated points 1 (Graph data structure), 2 (cycle detection over staged graph), 4 (Vec→HashSet), 5 (fuzz test) remain open and require deeper refactor of TaskManager.
